rulings.Case Title: JAMES SPRUELL et al. VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday Dec. 19, 2012. Line 1 - DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 5TH AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend plaintiff has been giving multiple times to amend and fails again to set forth sufficient facts per CCP 430.10(c) and address the diligence standard Re statute limitations. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GLORIA SANCHEZ et al VS. RE INVESTMENT & DEVELOPMENT, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday Dec. 19, 2012. Line 2 - PLAINTIFF GLORIA SANCHEZ's Motion For Relief Of Objections. Grant met standard per CCP 2030.290(a) and 2031.300(a) and no opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ISAAC GUTIERREZ et al VS. COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS LP et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday Dec. 19, 2012. Line 3 - DEFENDANT CWMBS, INC, BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS INC, RECON TRUST COMPANY N.A. and THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. 1. Sustain with 20 days leave to amend to address all issues raised in the demurrer. 2. Plaintiffs shall post $618,440.14 with court at time filing amended complaint. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALCIDES VALLADARES PERLA VS. DMG ASET MANAGEMENT LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday Dec. 19, 2012. Line 4 - DEFENDANT RECONTRUCT COMPANY, N.A. and BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off calendar failed to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TOM HARRINGTON et al VS. PAUL GORDON NORTHROP III et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday Dec. 19, 2012. Line 5 - PLAINTIFF TOM HARRINGTON, TIM HARRINGTON, MARY BARNACLE-HARRINGTON and TOM HARRINGTON AS TRUSTEE OF THE HARRINGTON FAMILY's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation. Hearing required to address service and first appearance fee. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARDIOVASCULAR ASSOCIATES RETIREMENT PLAN VS. RICHARD LOHR DBA AUTO 360 et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday Dec. 19, 2012. Line 6 - DEFENDANT RICHARD LOHR DBA AUTO 360's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule 5 days to answer, demurrer improperly raises factual issues. Nota Bene CCP 128.5 has not been applicable since December 31, 1994. =(501/REQ)
